ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Text-based PDF. Clear and fully readable. Original certificate with ICC stamp and verification QR code.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, 3 pages. Clear and fully readable. Issued by Borealis AG with BOREALIS logo header.

lc_check.lc_validation_steps: Searched certificate for LC-related terms: 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit', 'LC No.', 'LC Number'. None found. The remarks field contains reference numbers (2800205313, 86704476–86704480) and certificate number SEG-23D-788974. None of these constitute an LC reference. LC exception is NOT activated.

locations_found: Invoice page 1: 'Issued by Borealis AG' in footer block
Invoice page 1: 'BOREALIS' logo/header at top of page
Invoice page 3: 'Exporter: Borealis AG, Vienna ... c/o Borealis AB' in exporter block
Invoice page 1: 'Supplier VAT number SE502065098101' (SE-prefix confirms Sweden)
Invoice page 3: 'SE - 444 86 STENUNGSUND, SWEDEN' in exporter address

criteria_checked.result: No explicit invoice number in certificate. Certificate remarks contain order number 2800205313 and delivery numbers 86704476-86704480 which match invoice order number and delivery numbers.

Certificate consignor 'Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB' found in invoice: 'Issued by Borealis AG' (footer), 'Exporter: Borealis AG, Vienna ... c/o Borealis AB' (page 3), 'BOREALIS' (header logo), Supplier VAT SE502065098101 (SE-prefix confirms Sweden).
Certificate consignee 'DEMIRER KABLO TESISLERI SAN VE TIC A.S.' matches invoice 'Customer Name: Demirer Kablo Tesisleri San. ve Tic. A.S.' after normalization.

parning_validation.notes: All three criteria passed. Valid document pair confirmed.

consignor.certificate_value: Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB, Industrivägen 3, 444 86, STENUNGSUND, Sverige
consignor.invoice_value: Exporter: Borealis AG, Vienna VAT ID No.: SE502065098101, c/o Borealis AB, SE - 444 86 STENUNGSUND, SWEDEN; Issued by: Borealis AG

comparison_steps.description: Search for certificate consignor name in all invoice files and pages
comparison_steps.details: Certificate consignor is 'Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB'. Invoice footer on all pages states 'Issued by Borealis AG'. Invoice page 3 exporter block states 'Exporter: Borealis AG, Vienna ... c/o Borealis AB, SE - 444 86 STENUNGSUND, SWEDEN'. Both 'Borealis AG' and 'Borealis AB' are explicitly found in the invoice. The full consignor text 'Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB' is identifiable in the exporter block on page 3.

comparison_steps.description: Verify consignor country matches between certificate and invoice
comparison_steps.details: Certificate states 'Sverige' (Sweden). Invoice exporter block on page 3 states 'SE - 444 86 STENUNGSUND, SWEDEN'. Additionally, Supplier VAT number SE502065098101 has SE-prefix confirming Sweden per rule 4.1.2.1. Country verified.

rules_applied.rule_description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found explicitly in invoice exporter block and footer
Land verification via indirect identifier – SE prefix in Supplier VAT number confirms Sweden
Land verification – Sverige/Sweden matches SWEDEN in exporter block

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB, Industrivägen 3, 444 86, STENUNGSUND, Sverige'. The invoice is issued by Borealis AG (footer on all pages). The invoice page 3 exporter block reads: 'Exporter: Borealis AG, Vienna VAT ID No.: SE502065098101 c/o Borealis AB SE - 444 86 STENUNGSUND, SWEDEN'. This contains the exact company name 'Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB' matching the certificate. The address in the exporter block (SE - 444 86 STENUNGSUND, SWEDEN) matches the certificate address (444 86, STENUNGSUND, Sverige). The Supplier VAT SE502065098101 has SE-prefix confirming Sweden. Country match confirmed. Note: The invoice is formally 'Issued by Borealis AG' with registered address in Vienna/Austria, but the exporter block explicitly identifies 'Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB, SE - 444 86 STENUNGSUND, SWEDEN' matching the certificate consignor exactly. Per rule 4.1.0, the consignor name is found explicitly in the invoice.

consignee.certificate_value: DEMIRER KABLO TESISLERI SAN VE TIC A.S., BEYBI GIZ PLAZA N:1 K:30, 34398 SARIYER - ISTANBUL, Turkey
consignee.invoice_value: Demirer Kablo Tesisleri San. ve Tic. A.S., Beybi Giz Plaza N:1 K:30, 34398 SARIYER ISTANBUL, TURKEY

comparison_steps.step: 4.2.0.2 – Priority identification of consignee in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Search for consignee in primary billing fields first
comparison_steps.details: Invoice 'Customer Name / Mailing address' field (primary billing field) contains 'Demirer Kablo Tesisleri San. ve Tic. A.S.' with address 'Beybi Giz Plaza N:1 K:30, 34398 SARIYER ISTANBUL, TURKEY'. This is a primary billing field matching the certificate consignee.

Certificate: 'DEMIRER KABLO TESISLERI SAN VE TIC A.S.' → normalized: 'demirer kablo tesisleri san ve tic a.s.'. Invoice: 'Demirer Kablo Tesisleri San. ve Tic. A.S.' → normalized: 'demirer kablo tesisleri san. ve tic. a.s.'. The difference is only punctuation ('San' vs 'San.') which is a minor dot/period normalization. Same juridical entity.

rules_applied.rule_description: Priority identification – consignee found in primary billing field 'Customer Name / Mailing address'
Normalization – case, punctuation (dot after San), spacing normalized
Land verification – Turkey matches TURKEY after case normalization

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'DEMIRER KABLO TESISLERI SAN VE TIC A.S.' at 'BEYBI GIZ PLAZA N:1 K:30, 34398 SARIYER - ISTANBUL, Turkey'. Invoice 'Customer Name / Mailing address': 'Demirer Kablo Tesisleri San. ve Tic. A.S.' at 'Beybi Giz Plaza N:1 K:30, 34398 SARIYER ISTANBUL, TURKEY'. The company names are identical after normalization of case and punctuation (SAN vs San., period after San). The addresses match (minor difference: SARIYER - ISTANBUL vs SARIYER ISTANBUL, hyphen/space is formatting). Country Turkey/TURKEY matches. The same party also appears in 'Customer name/address' and 'Delivery address' fields confirming consistency. MATCH.

goods_description.invoice_value: Borlink LS4201H Octabin LD Polyethylene; Total number of packages: 100 OCT

comparison_steps.description: Check if article numbers in certificate can be identified in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Certificate goods description contains 'LS4201H'. Invoice line items all describe 'Borlink LS4201H Octabin LD Polyethylene'. The article/material identifier 'LS4201H' is explicitly present in both documents. MATCH via article number identification.

Certificate: 'LS4201H'. Invoice: 'Borlink LS4201H Octabin LD Polyethylene'. The identity-bearing designation 'LS4201H' is found exactly in the invoice. 'Borlink' is a brand prefix and 'Octabin LD Polyethylene' is a non-identity-bearing addition per rule 4.3.4. The certificate also states '100 OCT' which matches invoice 'Total number of packages 100 OCT'.

comparison_steps.description: Assess additional terms in invoice not in certificate
comparison_steps.details: Invoice contains additional terms 'Borlink', 'Octabin', 'LD Polyethylene' which are non-identity-bearing product specification additions. The certificate's '100 OCT (1000 kg net)' matches 'Total number of packages 100 OCT'. These additions do not affect product identity.

rules_applied.rule_description: Priority 1 – Article number LS4201H identified exactly in invoice
Non-identity-bearing additions – Borlink, Octabin, LD Polyethylene are additions that do not change product identity

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate box 6 states: '100 OCT (1000 kg net) LS4201H'. The identity-bearing main designation is 'LS4201H' which is a material/product code. Invoice line items on all rows describe 'Borlink LS4201H Octabin LD Polyethylene'. 'LS4201H' appears exactly in the invoice. Per rule 4.3.2, article number match takes Priority 1. The packaging description '100 OCT' from the certificate matches the invoice total 'Total number of packages 100 OCT' on page 2. Per rule 4.3.4, additional terms in the invoice (Borlink brand, Octabin packaging type, LD Polyethylene material description) are non-identity-bearing additions that do not change product identity. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Determine which quantity in certificate is the verification basis
comparison_steps.details: Certificate box 7 states 'Gross 104.000kg'. This is the verification-basis quantity. Box 6 also contains '100 OCT (1000 kg net)' which are additional quantities. Per rule 4.4.2.1, box 7 is always the verification basis.

comparison_steps.description: Check if the numeric value from box 7 can be identified in the invoice
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 'Gross 104.000kg'. Applying thousands separator normalization per rule 4.4.3.3: 104.000 → 104000 (the period is a thousands separator since the value is a whole number). Invoice page 3: 'Total gross weight 104.000,00 KG'. Normalizing: 104.000,00 → 104000.00 KG → 104000 KG. Both values are 104000 KG. Weight category: certificate says 'Gross', invoice says 'Total gross weight'. Both are Gross Weight. MATCH.

Certificate box 6 states '100 OCT (1000 kg net)'. Invoice states 'Total number of packages 100 OCT' and 'Total net weight 100.000,00 KG'. 100 OCT matches. The '1000 kg net' in certificate appears to mean 1000 kg net per OCT (octabin), and 100 × 1000 = 100,000 kg net which matches invoice Total net weight 100.000,00 KG (= 100,000 kg). No contradictions found.

rules_applied.rule_description: Box 7 quantity is verification basis – Gross 104.000kg
Thousands separator normalization – period as thousands separator in 104.000 → 104000
Occurrence check – 104000 KG Gross identified in invoice as Total gross weight 104.000,00 KG
Multiple quantity check – no contradictions found with net weight or package count

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7: 'Gross 104.000kg'. Per rule 4.4.2.1, this is the verification-basis quantity. The value '104.000' with period as thousands separator (rule 4.4.3.3 – both values are whole numbers, period occurs only as thousands separator) normalizes to 104000. The unit is 'kg' and weight category is 'Gross'. Invoice page 3 states 'Total gross weight 104.000,00 KG'. Normalizing the European number format: 104.000,00 → 104000.00 → 104000 KG. Values match exactly: 104000 KG Gross = 104000 KG Total gross weight. Additionally, certificate box 6 states '100 OCT (1000 kg net)' and invoice page 2 states 'Total number of packages 100 OCT', page 3 states 'Total net weight 100.000,00 KG' (= 100000 KG). The net weight is consistent (100 OCT × 1000 kg net each = 100000 kg net). No contradictions in any quantity. MATCH.

country_of_origin.invoice_value: Sweden (Country of origin field, all line items)

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin indication in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice has a dedicated 'Country of origin' column. All line items consistently show 'Sweden' as country of origin.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'European Community; Sweden'. Check if Sweden is an EU member state.
comparison_steps.details: Sweden (SE) is an EU member state. Certificate date is 2023-03-07, Sweden is EU member at this date (EU-27). Certificate states 'European Community' which is equivalent to 'European Union/EU' per rule 4.5.4.1.

comparison_steps.step: 4.5.4.2.1 – EU combined with one specific member state
comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'European Community; Sweden'. Invoice states 'Sweden'. Apply rule 4.5.4.2.1.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate origin is 'European Community; Sweden' – EU combined with ONE specific EU member state. Invoice explicitly confirms 'Sweden' as Country of origin on all rows. Sweden is an EU member state. Per rule 4.5.4.2, EU and a specific EU member state are interchangeable. The invoice confirms 'Sweden' which verifies both the specific country and the EU membership. No non-EU origins in the invoice. MATCH.

rules_applied.rule_description: Identification – 'Country of origin' column found in invoice, all rows show 'Sweden'
EU normalization – European Community treated as EU; Sweden is EU member (EU-27)
EU member state equivalence – Sweden in invoice verifies 'European Community; Sweden' in certificate
EU combined with one specific member state – invoice confirms Sweden, which satisfies both EU and Sweden origin claims

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3: 'European Community; Sweden'. This states that the origin is European Community (= EU) and specifically Sweden. Invoice has a dedicated 'Country of origin' column that consistently shows 'Sweden' for all line items. Per rule 4.5.4.1, 'European Community' is equivalent to EU. Per rule 4.5.4.2, 'EU' and a specific EU member state are interchangeable. Sweden is an EU member state at the certificate date (2023-03-07). The invoice explicitly confirms 'Sweden' as origin, which verifies both the specific Sweden origin and the EU membership claim. Per rule 4.5.4.2.1, when certificate states 'EU [one specific EU country]' and invoice confirms that EU country, this is MATCH. No non-EU origins appear in the invoice. All origins in the invoice are 'Sweden' only. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.details: No LC reference found in certificate. Standard verification applies.
Document A (Certificate of Origin) is the certificate file. Document B (Invoice) is the invoice file. Single certificate, single invoice. No pairing ambiguity.

All three criteria passed: (1) order number 2800205313 and delivery numbers match, (2) consignor Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB found in invoice exporter block, (3) consignee Demirer Kablo Tesisleri found in invoice customer fields.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Koncernstruktur – consignor search in all invoice files
rule_evaluation_log.details: Consignor 'Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB' explicitly found in invoice exporter block (page 3), issued-by footer (all pages), and header logo (BOREALIS). Country confirmed via Supplier VAT SE-prefix and exporter address 'SWEDEN'.
Supplier VAT SE502065098101 – SE prefix confirms Sweden.
Consignee found in primary billing field 'Customer Name / Mailing address'.
Article identifier LS4201H found exactly in invoice line items ('Borlink LS4201H Octabin LD Polyethylene').
Box 7 contains 'Gross 104.000kg' – this is the verification-basis quantity.
Period in '104.000' treated as thousands separator (whole number). Normalized to 104000.
104000 KG Gross Weight identified in invoice Total gross weight 104.000,00 KG (= 104000 KG). Exact match.
Net weight 100000 KG and package count 100 OCT also verified as consistent. No contradictions.
'European Community' treated as equivalent to EU/European Union.
Sweden is EU member (EU-27, post-Brexit). Invoice 'Sweden' verifies certificate 'European Community; Sweden'.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: EU combined with one specific member state
rule_evaluation_log.details: Certificate states EU + Sweden. Invoice confirms Sweden. Sweden is EU member. Generellt EU-ursprungsuttalande not needed since specific country confirmed.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Consignor MISMATCH due to invoice issuer being in Austria (Vienna) while certificate consignor is in Sweden
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: The invoice is formally 'Issued by Borealis AG, Trabrennstr. 6-8, 1020 Vienna' (Austria). However, the invoice exporter block on page 3 explicitly states 'Exporter: Borealis AG, Vienna ... c/o Borealis AB, SE - 444 86 STENUNGSUND, SWEDEN' which matches the certificate consignor exactly. Per rule 4.1.0, the consignor name and associated Swedish address are explicitly found in the invoice. The Supplier VAT SE502065098101 confirms Swedish connection. The fact that Borealis AG has a registered seat in Vienna does not negate the explicit identification of the Swedish exporter address.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Goods description MISMATCH because certificate says 'LS4201H' while invoice says 'Borlink LS4201H Octabin LD Polyethylene'
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Per rule 4.3.2, article number 'LS4201H' is found exactly in invoice. Per rule 4.3.4, 'Borlink', 'Octabin', 'LD Polyethylene' are non-identity-bearing additions (brand, packaging type, material category). These do not change product identity.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Origin MISMATCH because certificate says 'European Community; Sweden' but invoice only says 'Sweden'
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Per rule 4.5.4.2.1, when certificate states EU combined with one specific EU member state and invoice confirms that member state, this is MATCH. Sweden is EU-27 member. The invoice consistently confirms 'Sweden' as Country of origin. Per rule 4.5.4.2, EU and specific EU member state are interchangeable. No non-EU origins in invoice.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Samtliga kontrollpunkter överensstämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändaren Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB identifieras i fakturans exportörsblock med adress i Stenungsund, Sverige. Mottagaren Demirer Kablo Tesisleri San. ve Tic. A.S. i Istanbul, Turkiet matchar fakturans kunduppgifter. Varubeskrivningen LS4201H och kvantiteten 104 000 kg brutto bekräftas av fakturan. Ursprungslandet European Community/Sweden verifieras genom fakturans landsangivelse Sweden.
overall_assessment.notes: Certificate references order number 2800205313 and delivery numbers 86704476-86704480, all of which are confirmed in the invoice. Invoice number 8860334484 dated 10.03.2023 is not explicitly referenced in the certificate but the order and delivery references provide strong linkage.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB, Industrivägen 3, 444 86, STENUNGSUND, Sverige
sections.invoice_value: Exporter: Borealis AG, Vienna VAT ID No.: SE502065098101, c/o Borealis AB, SE - 444 86 STENUNGSUND, SWEDEN
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur (4.1.0) – consignor name found explicitly in invoice exporter block; Land verified via SE-prefix in Supplier VAT (4.1.2.1)
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Borealis AG c/o Borealis AB' med adress i Stenungsund, Sverige, identifieras uttryckligen i fakturans exportörsblock på sida 3 som 'Exporter: Borealis AG, Vienna ... c/o Borealis AB, SE - 444 86 STENUNGSUND, SWEDEN'. Företagsnamnet och adressen matchar exakt. Landet Sverige bekräftas av exportörsadressen (SWEDEN) samt av Supplier VAT-numrets SE-prefix (SE502065098101). MATCH.

sections.certificate_value: DEMIRER KABLO TESISLERI SAN VE TIC A.S., BEYBI GIZ PLAZA N:1 K:30, 34398 SARIYER - ISTANBUL, Turkey
sections.invoice_value: Demirer Kablo Tesisleri San. ve Tic. A.S., Beybi Giz Plaza N:1 K:30, 34398 SARIYER ISTANBUL, TURKEY
sections.rule_applied: Primärt faktureringsfält (4.2.0.2) – consignee found in Customer Name; Normalisering av versaler och punktnotation (4.2.2.1)
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'DEMIRER KABLO TESISLERI SAN VE TIC A.S.' identifieras i fakturans fält 'Customer Name / Mailing address' som 'Demirer Kablo Tesisleri San. ve Tic. A.S.'. Skillnaden är enbart versaler/gemener och punktnotation (SAN vs San.). Adressen BEYBI GIZ PLAZA N:1 K:30, 34398 SARIYER matchar. Landet Turkey/TURKEY matchar efter versalnormalisering. MATCH.

sections.invoice_value: Borlink LS4201H Octabin LD Polyethylene; Total number of packages: 100 OCT
sections.rule_applied: Artikelnummermatchning Prioritet 1 (4.3.2) – LS4201H identifierat exakt i fakturan; Icke-identitetsbärande tillägg (4.3.4)
sections.motivation: Certifikatets identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'LS4201H' återfinns exakt i fakturans artikelrader som 'Borlink LS4201H Octabin LD Polyethylene'. Tilläggen 'Borlink' (varumärke), 'Octabin' (förpackningstyp) och 'LD Polyethylene' (materialbeskrivning) är icke-identitetsbärande och påverkar inte produktidentiteten. Dessutom matchar '100 OCT' i certifikatet fakturans 'Total number of packages 100 OCT'. MATCH.

Certifikatets box 7 anger 'Gross 104.000kg'. Efter normalisering av tusentalsavskiljare (punkt) blir värdet 104 000 kg bruttovikt. Fakturans sida 3 anger 'Total gross weight 104.000,00 KG' vilket efter normalisering av europeiskt nummerformat (punkt som tusentalsavskiljare, komma som decimalavskiljare) blir 104 000 kg. Värdena matchar exakt. Viktkategorin Gross/Total gross weight överensstämmer. Dessutom bekräftas nettovikten: certifikatets '1000 kg net' per OCT × 100 OCT = 100 000 kg netto matchar fakturans 'Total net weight 100.000,00 KG'. Inga motstridigheter. MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: EU-normalisering (4.5.4.1) – European Community = EU; EU-medlemslandsekvivalens (4.5.4.2) – Sweden är EU-medlem; EU + ett specifikt medlemsland (4.5.4.2.1)
sections.motivation: Certifikatets box 3 anger 'European Community; Sweden'. Fakturan har en dedikerad kolumn 'Country of origin' som konsekvent anger 'Sweden' för samtliga artikelrader. 'European Community' är ekvivalent med EU. Sverige är EU-medlemsstat (EU-27). Enligt regel 4.5.4.2.1 godkänns kombinationen 'EU + ett specifikt EU-medlemsland' när fakturan bekräftar det specifika landet. Inga icke-EU-ursprungsländer förekommer i fakturan. MATCH.

human_readable_report.summary: Samtliga fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet, ursprungsland) ger MATCH. Certifikatet kan verifieras mot den bifogade fakturan utan avvikelser. Dokumentparet är godkänt för automatisk hantering.

output_quality_checks.notes: All five checkpoints are MATCH with confidence >= 0.95. comparison_result = IDENTICAL is consistent. workflow_recommendation = AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL result. No blocking issues identified.
